name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #12
description: Florentine Brainrot #12 is a papal terminal single-panel relic built around Medici and Flash Game Guildhall. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Sei di Bastoni, used here as the witness card. Medici's codon strip repeats like a clerk trying not to laugh. Cosimo approves the lighting and ignores the crime. Serial MEDI-12 carries codon marker ATGGAAGATATATGTATT; Gematria marks BRAINROT at Σ 582.

attributes.value: a mutant laurel wreath made of browser tabs
